## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm --filter web typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm registry:all` runs without errors
- [ ] New components have a preview in `previews.tsx`
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, personal names, or internal URLs
- [ ] PR is focused — one topic per PR
